subcodes.first_line: The servant beareth witness to the oneness of God and His singleness, and that He is the First and the Last, the Manifest and the Hidden [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الخادم بوحدانیه الله و فردانیته و بانه هو الاول و الاخر و الظاهر و الباطن
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
